## 3.1.0
### Minor changes
- Removed the `GPU_ACCELERATION` CMake option. The build system now automatically determines if OpenCL is installed and turns on the GPU acceleration accordingly.

## 3.0.0
Release of the `gaden_core` library as part of the `Gaden-RT` changes. To see the changelog for older versions of gaden, see the [ROS repository](https://github.com/MAPIRlab/gaden).
